ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scans" (
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MRI scan */,
  "scan_name" TEXT /* Name of the MRI scan (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "n_subjects" INTEGER /* Number of subjects in the scan */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the subjects */,
  "age_at_birth_weeks" TEXT /* Age at birth in weeks (mean ± std deviation, range) */,
  "age_at_mri_weeks" TEXT /* Age at MRI scan in weeks (mean ± std deviation, range) */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Neonate, 1-year-old, 2-year-old) */,
  "scan_version" INTEGER /* Version of the scan */,
  "scan_status" TEXT /* Status of the scan (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date when the scan was performed */,
  "scan_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the scan was performed */,
  "scan_technique" TEXT /* Technique used for the scan (e.g., T1-weighted, T2-weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scans_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Neonate, 1-year-old, 2-year-old) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_group_start" TEXT /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_group_end" TEXT /* Ending age of the age group */,
  "age_group_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject (m/f) */,
  "age_at_birth_weeks" REAL /* Age at birth in weeks */,
  "age_at_mri_weeks" REAL /* Age at MRI scan in weeks */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the subject */,
  "weight_at_birth" REAL /* Weight of the subject at birth */,
  "weight_at_mri" REAL /* Weight of the subject at the time of the MRI */,
  "height_at_birth" REAL /* Height of the subject at birth */,
  "height_at_mri" REAL /* Height of the subject at the time of the MRI */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_data" (
  "scan_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan data entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "scan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MRI scan */,
  "scan_date" TEXT /* Date of the MRI scan */,
  "scan_location" TEXT /* Location where the MRI scan was performed */,
  "scan_technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the scan */,
  "scan_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scan */,
  "scan_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the scan (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "scan_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the scan */,
  "scan_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the scan */,
  "scan_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the scan */,
  "scan_software" TEXT /* Software used for the scan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES demographics ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_data_scan_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_id") REFERENCES scans ("scan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "scan_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scan data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the scan data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the scan data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scan_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_data_id") REFERENCES scan_data ("scan_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan file */,
  "scan_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scan data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the MRI scan file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the MRI scan file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., nii, nii.gz) */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, deprecated, deleted) */,
  "file_uploader" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_files_scan_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_data_id") REFERENCES scan_data ("scan_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_files_file_uploader FOREIGN KEY ("file_uploader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
